delegates_only_with_explicit_chaining_bu.description: Agent MUST only sub-dispatch when chaining budget is explicitly granted in dispatch brief and sub-task is orthogonal to test-engineer's own capabilities
delegates_only_with_explicit_chaining_bu.observable_check: execution_log contains task_dispatch AND chaining_budget_granted AND depth_within_limit AND fan_out_within_limit AND subtask_not_within_own_capability

delegates_under_depth_and_fan_out_limits.description: Sub-dispatch depth and fan-out MUST remain within granted budget limits at all times
delegates_under_depth_and_fan_out_limits.observable_check: NOT (execution_log contains depth_exceeded OR fan_out_exceeded OR depth > granted_depth OR fan_out > granted_fan_out)

delegates_to_correct_archetype_with_comp.description: Agent MUST dispatch to archetype matching sub-task nature with all required brief fields (objective, phase, write_boundary, evidence_required, stop_condition, chaining_budget)
delegates_to_correct_archetype_with_comp.observable_check: execution_log contains task_dispatch AND archetype_matches_subtask_nature AND brief contains objective AND phase AND write_boundary AND stop_condition AND chaining_budget

confirms_chaining_budget_and_tracks_cons.description: Agent MUST verify chaining budget is explicitly granted before sub-dispatching and track depth/fan-out consumption throughout execution
confirms_chaining_budget_and_tracks_cons.observable_check: execution_log contains chaining_budget_verified AND budget_tracked AND depth <= granted_depth AND fan_out <= granted_fan_out AND budget_state_known_at_return

synthesizes_subworker_results_before_ret.description: Agent MUST synthesize sub-worker findings into own return — NOT pass raw sub-worker output upward
synthesizes_subworker_results_before_ret.observable_check: NOT execution_log contains raw_subworker_output_passed_upward AND synthesis_present_in_return

resolves_subworker_rejection_before_esca.description: Agent MUST attempt to resolve sub-worker rejection within own context (max 2 attempts) before escalating to lead
resolves_subworker_rejection_before_esca.observable_check: execution_log contains subworker_rejection AND resolution_attempted AND (resolution_succeeded OR (resolution_attempts >= 2 AND escalated))

does_not_dispatch_without_chaining_budge.description: Agent MUST NOT sub-dispatch without explicit chaining budget grant in dispatch brief

does_not_dispatch_within_own_capability.description: Agent MUST NOT sub-dispatch tasks that are within test-engineer's own capabilities (oracle design, test authorship, testability audit, oracle honesty audit)
does_not_dispatch_within_own_capability.observable_check: NOT (execution_log contains task_dispatch AND subtask is test_engineer_scope AND budget_expended_unnecessarily)

does_not_dispatch_to_wrong_archetype.description: Agent MUST NOT dispatch to wrong archetype for sub-task nature or dispatch with incomplete brief missing required fields
does_not_dispatch_to_wrong_archetype.observable_check: NOT (execution_log contains task_dispatch AND (archetype mismatches subtask nature OR brief missing_required_field))
